instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris" and provides at least three specific examples of affordable attractions. Tailor the response for laypersons by simplifying any technical terms and providing clear explanations for public transportation options. The letter "P" must appear at least 15 times in the response. Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "Attractions", "Dining", "Transportation", and "BudgetTips". Each key must have a value that is an Array containing exactly 3 elements. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. The letter "P" must appear at most 14 times in the response.
response:
{
  "Attractions": [
    "Visit the free Palace of Versailles to see amazing paintings and peaceful parks without paying any money.",
    "Explore hidden gems of Paris like the Pantheon where you can learn about famous people for free.",
    "Walk through the peaceful Parc des Buttes-Chaumont to enjoy beautiful views and fresh air every single day."
  ],
  "Dining": [
    "Eat delicious pizza at a small place near the market to save money on your weekend trip.",
    "Try simple pasta at a local shop that offers cheap prices for hungry people traveling far away.",
    "Buy fresh bread and cheese from a market stall to make a perfect picnic for two people."
  ],
  "Transportation": [
    "Use the Paris Metro map to find the purple line that goes to many popular places easily.",
    "Purchase a weekly pass at any station to travel freely on buses and trains for seven whole days.",
    "Walk between nearby stops to save money and see more of the pretty streets along the way."
  ],
  "BudgetTips": [
    "Plan your meals carefully before you go so you do not waste money on expensive food items.",
    "Print out a map at home to avoid buying tickets or guides that cost too much cash.",
    "Pack water bottles and snacks in your bag to prevent buying drinks at costly tourist shops."
  ]
}

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints.new_constraint: The letter "P" must appear at most 14 times in the response.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints.org_constraint: The letter "P" must appear at least 15 times in the response.
